notes_for_human_reviewer: JARGON-FAILURE MODE. The submission is well-structured, executive-summary-style, and reads sophisticated at a glance. Read carefully it is empty: 'leverage cross-functional synergies', 'best-in-class', 'value-add', 'operationalize', 'driving alignment', 'unlock synergies'. Five+ jargon phrases — the prompt rule explicitly floors professional_voice when there are 2+. role_breadth still recites the job-description bullet list (caps at 2 per the prompt rule). Habits are pure jargon. Unknowns line ('continuous learning journey') performs humility without naming any actual unknown. Tests whether the grader sees through corporate-speak. Common drift: scoring 3-4 because the format LOOKS sophisticated.
